creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
Created attachment 171858
Patch to update sysutils/zrep to 1.6.1

The version of sysutils/zrep in ports is ancient (3+ years old) and includes a patch for operation on FreeBSD which is no longer needed. The supplied patch updates the port to the latest version, 1.6.1. The developer has added FreeBSD support so the existing files/patch-zrep is no longer needed and should be removed.

This update was submitted in cooperation with the zrep author.

Note that this patch provides a newer version than the one in pr209852.
